Vale-alvo ≥ 15–20 mg/L em infeções grave: Target trough ≥ 15–20 mg/L in severe infections (endocarditis/osteoarticular infection ≥ 20–30 mg/L). Obtain the sample before the dose after the loading dose.
Valganciclovir 900 mg PO 12/12h com alim: Valganciclovir 900 mg PO 12h with food; increase to 900 mg/day in the maintenance phase.
Valproato 40 mg/kg IV (máx 3 g) em 10 mi: Valproate 40 mg/kg IV (max 3 g) over 10 min; then 500 mg IV every 8 hours or infusion.
Valproato/ácido valpróico: queda rápida: Valproate/valproic acid: rapid drop in concentrations; association not recommended
Vancomicina 125 mg PO 6/6h durante 10 di: Vancomycin 125 mg PO 6h for 10 days is an accepted alternative; the SHEA/IDSA 2021 guideline prefers fidaxomicin when available.
Vancomicina 500 mg PO/SNG 6/6h; se houve: Vancomycin 500 mg PO/NG every 6 h; if there is ileus, consider rectal administration and IV metronidazole according to protocol.
Vancomicina: carga 25 mg/kg IV, depois r: Vancomycin: load 25 mg/kg IV, then individualized maintenance regimen to achieve AUC24/MIC 400–600.
Varfarina 5 mg PO/dia, titular por INR;: Warfarin 5 mg PO/day, titrated by INR; overlap with parenteral anticoagulant until therapeutic INR ≥ 24h.
Vasodilatação sistémica e pulmonar; freq: Systemic and pulmonary vasodilation; often associated with vasopressors.
Vasodilatadores podem potenciar aumento: Vasodilators can increase flow rate and reduce filling pressures
Vasopressina 0,01 unidades/min IV; titul: Vasopressin 0.01 units/min IV; titrate in increments of 0.005 units/min to target MAP.
Vecurónio bólus 0,1 mg/kg, depois 0,8–1,: Vecuronium bolus 0.1 mg/kg, then 0.8–1.2 mcg/kg/min; holder by TOF; reverse with sugammadex if necessary.
Velocidade habitualmente não superior a: Speed usually not exceeding 10 mEq/h; concentration up to 40 mEq/L; maximum 200 mEq/24 h according to the label consulted.
Ventilação e oxigenação, sobretudo sem v: Ventilation and oxygenation, especially without a protected airway
Verapamil 2,5–5 mg IV lento em 2 min, co: Verapamil 2.5–5 mg IV slow over 2 min, with continuous monitoring; repeat if necessary.
Via aérea desprotegida em doente com alt: Unprotected airway in a patient with altered state of consciousness
Via IV — bacteriemia associada a foco su: IV route — bacteremia associated with a susceptible focus
Via IV — endocardite ou meningite bacter: IV route — endocarditis or bacterial meningitis
Via oral — apresentação norte-americana: Oral route — immediate North American presentation
Via oral — PAC ou exacerbação de bronqui: Oral route — CAP or exacerbation of bronchitis, European presentation
Via oral — referência norte-americana im: Oral route — immediate North American reference
Vigiar AKI quando associado a vancomicin: Monitor AKI when associated with vancomycin.
Vigiar amónia (encefalopatia hiperamonié: Monitor ammonia (hyperammoniemic encephalopathy), platelets and liver function.
Vigiar CK e miopatia; suspender se CK >: Monitor CK and myopathy; suspend if CK > 5x ULN with symptoms or > 10x ULN.
Vigiar encefalopatia/mioclonias em DRC —: Monitor encephalopathy/myoclonus in CKD — consider EEG.
Vigiar extravasamento, isquemia, taquiar: Watch for extravasation, ischemia, tachyarrhythmia and increased lactate.
Vigiar glicémia (hiper/hipo) e bradicard: Monitor blood glucose levels (hyper/hypo) and bradycardia.
Monitor blood count in courses > 10–14 days.
Vigiar hipercaliémia (o trimetoprim bloq: Watch for hyperkalaemia (trimethoprim blocks sodium channels in the distal tubule).
Vigiar hipercaliémia, sobretudo em DRC/c: Monitor hyperkalaemia, especially in CKD/with ACE inhibitors.
Vigiar hiperglicemia, delirium, fraqueza: Monitor for hyperglycemia, delirium, weakness and secondary infection.
Vigiar hipertrigliceridemia, pancreatite: Monitor for hypertriglyceridemia, pancreatitis and analytical interference.
Vigiar hipocaliémia, hipernatrémia, hipo: Watch for hypokalemia, hypernatremia, hypocalcemia and hypercapnia.
Vigiar hipotensão durante a carga (perfu: Watch for hypotension during loading (slow perfusion) and QRS widening.
Vigiar hipotensão, taquicardia e hipocal: Monitor for hypotension, tachycardia and hypokalaemia.
Vigiar potássio (desce com a insulina) e: Monitor potassium (it drops with insulin) and hypoglycemia; transition to SC with overlap.
Vigiar provas hepáticas; sem ajuste de d: Monitor liver tests; no defined dose adjustment.
Vigiar redução do débito cardíaco e isqu: Watch for reduced cardiac output and coronary, mesenteric, cutaneous or digital ischemia.
Vigiar reflexos, PA e FR em doses altas: Monitor reflexes, BP and RR in high doses (neuromuscular blockade/respiratory depression).
Vigiar reintoxicação tardia (eliminação: Watch for late reintoxication (prolonged elimination of the complex).
Vigiar sedação, hipotensão ortostática e: Monitor sedation, orthostatic hypotension and QT.
Vigiar síndrome de perfusão de propofol: Watch for propofol infusion syndrome at high doses or prolonged exposure.
Vigiar toxicidade por propilenoglicol (g: Monitor for propylene glycol toxicity (osmolar gap, acidosis, AKI).
Vigiar transaminases; suspender se hepat: Monitor transaminases; discontinue if significant hepatotoxicity.
Vigilância clínica de hemorragia; sem TD: Clinical surveillance of hemorrhage; without TDM.
Voriconazol 6 mg/kg IV 12/12h × 2 doses,: Voriconazole 6 mg/kg IV every 12 hours for 2 doses, then 4 mg/kg every 12 hours; target trough 1–5.5 mg/L.
